title: Oath
doc_html:
§1902.  Oath

Every assessor shall, before entering upon the duties of his office, take and subscribe the oath of office prescribed by the constitution and laws of this state, and file the same with the secretary of state.

Acts 2001, No. 74, §1, eff. July 1, 2001.
doc_text:
§1902.  Oath
Every assessor shall, before entering upon the duties of his office, take and subscribe the oath of office prescribed by the constitution and laws of this state, and file the same with the secretary of state.
Acts 2001, No. 74, §1, eff. July 1, 2001.
